title: ERCOT DAM Energy Bid Awards 60 Day CSV download
description:
Day-ahead, hourly awards for offers to buy energy submitted by Qualified Scheduling Entities (QSEs) in ERCOT. Includes the settlement point name as well as bid curve for each interval. 

Extracted from the file named `60d_DAM_EnergyBidAwards-DD-MMM-YY` in the archive published by ERCOT
